articles.summary: Just Dial shares surged as much as 14% after the company reported strong Q1FY27 results. Net profit rose 4.1% YoY to Rs 166.2 crore, while revenue climbed 9.9% YoY to Rs 327.5 crore. EBITDA margin remained healthy at 26.
